  "claims": [
    "LGBTQ+ students experience harassment, violence, and lack of affirmation in school settings, which can harm their school performance, self-esteem, and mental health.",
    "The lack of adequate support in schools results in high dropout rates for LGBTQ+ students, which contributes to high rates of poverty, homelessness, and engagement with the criminal justice system.",
